name: Cursor
description: Cursor is commonly used to support ai / automation workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Cursor when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in ai / automation work.
founderWorkflow: Use Cursor to keep ai / automation work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Cursor before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
